name: Story of Raijin

abilities.name: Electric Fields
abilities.text: Friendly Scheme markers within 6" gain the hazardous trait.

abilities.name: Middle of the Storm
abilities.text: The area within 3" of this model is concealing. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain.

actions.name: Thunderous Blow
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3" away. For each raise this attack receives, increase the distance moved by up to +3".

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

actions.name: Maddening Drums
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose a marker within 6" and LoS of the target.
actions.effects: Move the target in a straight line into base contact with the chosen marker, then remove the marker. Deal +1 damage to the target for every marker it moved through (to a maximum of +3).

actions.name: Thunderstruck
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within range. Enemy models within (m)2" of the marker must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage and this model may move them 3". Then, remove the marker.

triggers.name: Flash of Insight
triggers.text: When resolving, friendly models within range of a (m) generated by this action gain an Insight token.

triggers.name: Permanence
triggers.text: When resolving, do not remove the made marker.

merge_warnings: Name mismatch: front='Story of Raijin' back='Raijin'
